action.reasoning: Observation: Iter 6 segfaulted again even with manual batching and 1000-graph subset. Analysis: The crashes are not due to DataLoader workers (we used manual batching); the test_env.py succeeded with DataLoader on 128 graphs, so PyG DataLoader works on a small scale. Decision: Switch to PyG DataLoader with num_workers=0, pin_memory=False, and batch_size=32. Use 1000-graph subset for 3 epochs to establish a first baseline and measure iteration time. Also update predict.py to use DataLoader for robustness in eval. Submit eval after training to get baseline score and confirm pipeline.
